entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00019) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00019 AGAINST IDIQ HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO UPDATE SECTION B SUPPLIES OR SERVICES AND PRICE/COSTS TO INCORPORATE TWO NEW IDIQ CLINS (I.E. 2015AC SF-52 & BENEFITS PROCESSING) IN SUPPORT OF CLIN 2015 SF-52 & BENEFITS PROCESSING.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00020) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00020 AGAINST IDIQ HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO UPDATE SECTION B SUPPLIES OR SERVICES AND PRICE/COSTS TO INCORPORATE A NEW IDIQ CLIN (I.E. 2029 MAP POSITION J./K ASSESSMENT PILOT) IN SUPPORT OF CLIN 2029 MAP POSITION J./K ASSESSMENT PILOT. ALSO INCORPORATE THE LATEST APPLICABLE WAGE DETERMINATIONS.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00023) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00023 AGAINST IDIQ HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO UPDATE SECTION B SUPPLIES OR SERVICES AND PRICE/COSTS TO INCORPORATE A NEW IDIQ CLINS 2005AC BACKGROUND CHECK: CREDIT CHECK, 2811/12 ONLY, 2005AD BACKGROUND CHECK: E86 ONLY AT E86 INITIATION, AND 2005AE BACKGROUND CHECK: MANUAL TIME OUTS AND RE-INITIATIONS IN SUPPORT OF CLIN 2005 BACKGROUND CHECK.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00024) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00024 AGAINST IDIQ HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO ADD SUB-CLINS 2009A "FAMS SERVICES - ASSESSMENT BATTERY TEST" THROUGH 8009A "FAMS SERVICES - ASSESSMENT BATTERY TEST" AGAINST SECTION B - "SUPPLIES OR SERVICES AND PRICE/COSTS" AND UPDATE SEGMENTS OF THE STATEMENT OF WORK WITHIN SECTION 2.2 "FEDERAL AIR MARSHALL RECRUITMENT&HIRING."

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00025) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00025 AGAINST IDIQ HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO UPDATE SECTION B SUPPLIES OR SERVICES AND PRICE/COSTS TO EXTEND THE PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE FOR FFP CLIN 2024. DATA WAREHOUSE FROM 01/02/2010 THRU 01/01/2011 TO 01/02/2010 TO 01/31/2011. IN SUPPORT OF THIS EFFORT, THE TOTAL PRICE/EST. COST (NTE) FOR CLIN 2024 WILL INCREASE FROM $3,840,685.00 BY $770,192.88 TO $4,610,877.88.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00026) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00026 AGAINST IDIQ HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO EXERCISE OPTION PERIOD 2. OPTION PERIOD 2 TASK ORDER HSTS01-11-J-HRM048 REVISES THE CLIN STRUCTURE FOR THE OPTION PERIOD 2 CLINS, DUE TO THE CONTINUING RESOLUTION AND THE REQUIREMENT TO FULLY FUND FIRM FIXED PRICE LINE ITEMS. AS AN ADMINISTRATIVE NECESSITY, THIS MODIFICATION IDENTIFIES THE FULL AMOUNT FOR EACH OPTION YEAR 2 CLIN; HOWEVER, THE CLINS IDENTIFIED HEREIN ARE ONLY EXERCISED AND FUNDED AT THE LEVELS IDENTIFIED IN TASK ORDER HSTS01-11-J-HRM048 MODIFICATION P00001, AND ANY FUTURE SUBSEQUENT FUNDING MODIFICATIONS, IF AWARDED.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00027) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00027 AGAINST IDIQ HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO: 1) ADD SUB-CLINS 2010A NON-TSO RECRUITING&HIRING WRITTEN ASSESSMENT TEST THROUGH 8010A NON-TSO RECRUITING&HIRING WRITTEN ASSESSMENT TEST AGAINST SECTION B SUPPLIES OR SERVICES AND PRICE/COSTS AND UPDATE SEGMENTS OF THE STATEMENT OF WORK WITHIN SECTION 2.3 NON-TSO RECRUITMENT AND HIRING; AND 2) INCREASE THE NUMBER OF MEDICAL ASSESSMENTS TO CLIN 2006AC MEDICAL PROCESSING BY 736 WHICH INCREASES COST BY $382,278.40.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00028) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00028 AGAINST IDIQ HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO INCORPORATE CLIN 3024 DATA WAREHOUSE, WHICH IS WITHIN SCOPE OF THE IDIQ, AND UPDATE SECTION B SUPPLIES OR SERVICES AND PRICE/COSTS TO REFLECT THIS REQUIREMENT, IN ACCORDANCE WITH SECTION I.11 CHANGES-COST REIMBURSEMENT OF THE SUBJECT CONTRACT.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
